dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION • For subcutaneous injection only; doses are not interchangeable ( 2.1 ) • Glatopa 20 mg/mL per day ( 2.1 ) • Glatopa 40 mg/mL three times per week ( 2.1 ) • Before use, allow the solution to warm to room temperature ( 2.2 ) 2.1 Recommended Dose Glatopa is for subcutaneous use only. Do not administer intravenously. The dosing schedule depends on the product strength that is selected. The recommended doses are: • Glatopa 20 mg per mL: administer once per day or • Glato
